title: The Night Is Young
writer: Edgar Allan Woolf, Franz Schulz, Vicki Baum
actors: Ramon Novarro, Evelyn Laye, Charles Butterworth
plot: Austrian Emperor Franz Josef has arranged a marriage for his nephew, the Archduke Paul Gustave - nicknamed Gustl - to the suitable Princess Matilda, a woman Gustl can't even remember. He is instead in love with the Hungarian Count...
